name: Maltego
description: Author Maltego .mtgx graph files and run primitive OSINT lookups (whois / DNS / ASN / crt.sh) from inside OpenClaw. Phase A only; Phase B in-Maltego transforms ship as a separate .mtz import.

outputDir.description: Default directory for saved .mtgx graph files. Defaults to ~/MaltegoGraphs.

lookupTimeoutMs.description: Per-lookup timeout in ms. Currently applied to crt.sh only; whois/dns/asn use library defaults.
